title: ClearCore
description: Featuring an Immersive and Ambient Experience! The official ClearCore Modpack! 1.21.1 Release
body:
# ClearCore:
## 🌿Ambient & Immersive Experience
### Best Suited with Headphones 🎧 :D

![Look Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d2bf6c78d9f20a027ea77ddb71fd47cdbe3db3a.png)

Listen to nature, feel cozy, and immersed into minecraft all at the same time. ClearCore Provides a clean experince- like no other modpack, after a long day of work, or a boring day. Either way, you can enjoy minecraft, and forget the stress. Introducing.. ClearCore With MC-1.21.1!

- ~~Boring Old~~ New, Fresh, & Relaxing Experience


<details>
